items.title: Baba Miller Turns Heads Across NBA Summer League Debut Weekend
items.author: Yahoo Sports
items.body_excerpt: Baba Miller Turns Heads Across NBA Summer League Debut Weekend Yahoo Sports

items.title: Asked Baba Miller about Keaton Wagler's 3rd quarter:
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
Asked Baba Miller about Keaton Wagler's 3rd quarter:

"It was great. I feel like no one really panicked after last game. It was a rough game for all of us. And just seeing him today play like he's played the whole year has been great. But I feel that we all kind of expected it."

items.title: Asked Baba Miller about what he is focusing on when it comes to his shooting:
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
Asked Baba Miller about what he is focusing on when it comes to his shooting:

"Just consistency. Just kind of the flow... I got pretty good touch. It's just kind of finding that rhythm where I can have consistent mechanics where it doesn't change from shot to shot and just live with the results"

items.title: Keaton Wagler postgame says Baba Miller is an underrated player. Plays really good defense and doesn't force anything on offense. Does the little things.
items.author: Hoop Informatics
items.body_excerpt:
Keaton Wagler postgame says Baba Miller is an underrated player. Plays really good defense and doesn't force anything on offense. Does the little things. 

On his own 23-point game: Stayed under control. Learned from last game to handle the physicality and play at his own pace. Playing freely.

items.title: Final: Clippers 104, Jazz 82. Keaton Wagler’s 3rd quarter display lifted Los Angeles to their first Summer League win as the guard scored 18 in the frame and 23 for the game. Baba Miller had 15 points, 5 rebounds; Sean Pedulla was +30; Nick Martinelli added 14 points, 6 rebounds.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Final: Clippers 104, Jazz 82. Keaton Wagler’s 3rd quarter display lifted Los Angeles to their first Summer League win as the guard scored 18 in the frame and 23 for the game. Baba Miller had 15 points, 5 rebounds; Sean Pedulla was +30; Nick Martinelli added 14 points, 6 rebounds.

items.title: Halftime: Clippers 40, Jazz 38. It’s been a more aggressive offensive showing for Keaton Wagler tonight, as the No. 5 overall pick has already taken 7 shots. Wagler has 5 points and 3 assists. Baba Miller with 9 points. Darryn Peterson leads all scorers with 12 points for Utah.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Halftime: Clippers 40, Jazz 38. It’s been a more aggressive offensive showing for Keaton Wagler tonight, as the No. 5 overall pick has already taken 7 shots. Wagler has 5 points and 3 assists. Baba Miller with 9 points. Darryn Peterson leads all scorers with 12 points for Utah.

items.title: Clippers lead Jazz 19-13 after one. Baba Miller paces the team with 5 points, while Nick Martinelli has 4. Keaton Wagler has 3 points and 2 assists in 8 minutes. Clippers shot 38%. Darryn Peterson has 4 points for Utah.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Clippers lead Jazz 19-13 after one. Baba Miller paces the team with 5 points, while Nick Martinelli has 4. Keaton Wagler has 3 points and 2 assists in 8 minutes. Clippers shot 38%. Darryn Peterson has 4 points for Utah.

items.title: Asked Baba Miller about Keaton Wagler ahead of tonight's Clippers-Jazz game
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
Asked Baba Miller about Keaton Wagler ahead of tonight's Clippers-Jazz game

"He's locked in. Just trying to get better every day. But he has the sense of just -- he's gonna be good. Like, he's an amazing player, and he knows that."

items.title: Final: Kings 91, Clippers 85. Keaton Wagler scored 7 points in his Clippers debut. Cam Christie led with 15 points and 8 rebounds. Sean Pedulla and Nick Martinelli each had 11 off the bench. Baba Miller scored 12. Clippers next play on Sunday against Utah.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Final: Kings 91, Clippers 85. Keaton Wagler scored 7 points in his Clippers debut. Cam Christie led with 15 points and 8 rebounds. Sean Pedulla and Nick Martinelli each had 11 off the bench. Baba Miller scored 12. Clippers next play on Sunday against Utah.

items.title: The Los Angeles Clippers signed Baba Miller to a four-year, $9.61 million deal, which includes two guaranteed years, agents Deirunas Visockas and Guillermo Bermejo of Gersh Basketball told HoopsHype. This is the highest overall amount of any second-round pick in the 2026 NBA Draf
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: The Los Angeles Clippers signed Baba Miller to a four-year, $9.61 million deal, which includes two guaranteed years, agents Deirunas Visockas and Guillermo Bermejo of Gersh Basketball told HoopsHype. This is the highest overall amount of any second-round pick in the 2026 NBA Draft so far.

items.title: LA Clippers statement SZN, Baba Miller edition
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
LA Clippers statement SZN, Baba Miller edition

athletic ✅
skilled✅
great size✅
great feel✅
excellent passer✅
excellent finisher✅
excellent rebounder✅
versatile defender✅

items.title: LA Clippers have officially announced the drafting of Baba Miller with the 36th overall pick in the 2026 NBA Draft. Lawrence Frank: “Baba is an athletic, skilled forward with great size and feel. He is an excellent passer, finisher and rebounder, as well as a versatile defender.”
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: LA Clippers have officially announced the drafting of Baba Miller with the 36th overall pick in the 2026 NBA Draft. Lawrence Frank: “Baba is an athletic, skilled forward with great size and feel. He is an excellent passer, finisher and rebounder, as well as a versatile defender.”

With the 36th pick of the NBA Draft the Los Angeles Clippers select Baba Miller!

The 2026 NBA Draft is LIVE on ESPN.

items.title: I would expect Cincinnati power forward Baba Miller to have a good chance to be on a standard contract with the LA Clippers.
items.author: Law Murray 📘
items.body_excerpt:
I would expect Cincinnati power forward Baba Miller to have a good chance to be on a standard contract with the LA Clippers. 

Miller is 6'11" with a 7'2" wingspan with good movement skills and solid explosion.

items.title: My kids graded the Baba Miller pick very highly, solely based on his first name being Baba and him having a chain that appeared to be a B with demon horns. Big hit with the 11 and 8-year-olds.
items.author: Dan Devine
items.body_excerpt: My kids graded the Baba Miller pick very highly, solely based on his first name being Baba and him having a chain that appeared to be a B with demon horns. Big hit with the 11 and 8-year-olds.

items.title: Baba Miller gives me kind of Mfiondu Kabengele vibes, which is funny because both spent time at FSU and both were drafted by the Clippers.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Baba Miller gives me kind of Mfiondu Kabengele vibes, which is funny because both spent time at FSU and both were drafted by the Clippers.

But Miller is a better passer and a more versatile defender than Kabengele (who has had a nice run overseas the last few years).

items.title: Baba Miller played basketball with Real Madrid before coming over to the United States for college at Florida State. Miller spent two years with Florida State before one year at Florida Atlantic and this final season at Cincinnati.
items.author: Justin Russo
items.body_excerpt: Baba Miller played basketball with Real Madrid before coming over to the United States for college at Florida State. Miller spent two years with Florida State before one year at Florida Atlantic and this final season at Cincinnati.

media.description: By Gerald Bourguet The 2026 NBA Draft is just a week away, and while the Phoenix Suns currently only have one distant pick at No. 47, recent history suggests there's a strong possibility they move up ...
